scripts.prebuild: rm -rf dist && find src -name '*.d.ts' -o -name '*.d.ts.map' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.js.map' | xargs -r rm -f
scripts.guard:no-stray-artifacts: test -z "$(find src \( -name '*.d.ts' -o -name '*.js' \) -print -quit)" || (echo '❌ Stray build artifacts in src/. Run: npm run prebuild' && exit 1)
